title: cool guns western
description: adds western themed guns to minecraft without being game changing
body:
adds 4 guns

lever action rifle

damage 7

cooldown 15 ticks

revolver

damage 3.5

cooldown 9 ticks

Double barrel shotgun

damage 7

cooldown 13 ticks

Henry rifle

damage 6

cooldown 13 ticks

made with mcreator.
